overview: Mardu Monument is a midrange strategy that leverages recurring defensive resources and efficient spot removal to outlast opponents. By cycling Monument to Endurance for consistent 3/3 blockers and pairing it with cheap debuffs like Moonshadow and Cool but Rude, the deck stabilizes early and transitions into a resilient late game. The white-black-red color identity provides a balanced toolkit of life gain, removal, and card advantage to navigate Standard's meta.
win_conditions: Trading up with recurring 3/3 Wall tokens while draining opponent's board
Outlasting opponents through efficient -X/-0 removal and life total management
Closing out games with incremental advantage from repeated Monument cycles

keep_criteria: Hands with at least two lands and a one- or two-drop removal spell
Hands containing Monument to Endurance paired with early interaction
Hands that can play a threat or blocker on turn two
mulligan_criteria: Mana-heavy hands with no early interaction
Hands lacking removal to handle aggressive starts
Hands with only high-cost cards and no ramp

early_game: Prioritize playing lands and casting Moonshadow or Cool but Rude to disrupt early threats
Hold up mana for removal while setting up Monument to Endurance on turn three or four
Use early removal to buy time for the Monument to enter and generate a Wall token
mid_game: Cycle the Monument to the bottom of the library to avoid life loss while maintaining board presence
Trade opponent's creatures into the recurring Wall tokens to preserve your life total
Use cheap removal to clear the way for incremental value and card advantage
late_game: Let the Monument cycle repeatedly to generate infinite blockers and drain opponent's resources
Focus on life gain and board control to force opponents into unfavorable trades
Manage the Monument's upkeep carefully to maximize token generation without taking lethal damage

key_cards.name: Monument to Endurance
key_cards.role: Recurring defensive engine and sacrifice outlet
key_cards.notes: Cast on turn three or four to generate a 3/3 Wall token. Return it to the library during upkeep to avoid life loss and recycle it later, or keep it to block repeatedly if life is not a concern.

key_cards.name: Moonshadow
key_cards.role: Efficient black removal and combat trick
key_cards.notes: Use to kill or severely weaken early threats. Hold up black mana to counter aggressive turns or reduce large creatures to manageable sizes for your Walls.

key_cards.name: Cool but Rude
key_cards.role: Fast red spot removal and tempo tool
key_cards.notes: Cast on opponent's turn to remove threats before they attack. Pairs well with Monument by clearing the board so your recurring Walls can dominate combat.

sequencing_tips: Always assess life totals before deciding whether to keep or cycle Monument to Endurance
Hold up removal mana during opponent's turn to maximize surprise and combat disruption
Prioritize cycling the Monument when you have a full board of Walls to maintain pressure without paying life
Use Moonshadow and Cool but Rude to clear the path for Monument's entry, ensuring the initial Wall token survives

matchups.advice: Prioritize early removal and cycle Monument quickly to establish a wall of blockers. Avoid trading life for board control.
watch_for: Early curve threats that bypass Walls
Removal that targets your recurring tokens

matchups.advice: Use Monument to exhaust their removal spells and force inefficient trades. Preserve life total while cycling the artifact.
watch_for: Board wipes that clear your Walls
Card draw engines that outvalue your removal suite

matchups.advice: Race with recurring blockers while using cheap removal to disrupt their key threats. Manage the Monument's upkeep to avoid self-damage.
watch_for: Value engines that outscale your token generation

common_threats: Fast aggressive creatures that pressure life total before Monument resolves
Board wipes that clear recurring Wall tokens
Efficient removal spells that target Monument to Endurance

overview_evidence.evidence_span: Monument to Endurance, Moonshadow, Cool but Rude
